panels.title: Default NGINX (stub_status) — everything vanilla nginx exposes
Requests / s
panels.description: nginx stub_status total request rate — the only request signal vanilla nginx exposes.

panels.title: Avg Latency
panels.description: Avg request duration (µs metric → ms). Per-route/upstream breakdowns below — dimensions stub_status cannot produce.

panels.title: Request Duration Distribution
panels.description: Exp-histogram latency distribution (µs). The shape — not just an average — is the OTel value-add.

panels.title: Slowest Routes (avg ms · http.route)
panels.description: Per-route latency (location name) — only possible because the module emits a per-route histogram.

panels.title: Avg Duration by Upstream Zone (ms · nginx.upstream.zone)
Error Log (nginx.error — coalesced)
panels.description: OTel error-log signal: coalesced nginx error LogRecords (severity ≥ warn). Body = verbatim message; nginx.error.coalesced_count = flood size.
